title: match — authorization policies
description: Seven policies, one per owned model. Every ability resolves through spatie/laravel-permission then narrows by tenant scope + role-specific rules. Parent role visibility is narrowed to matches whose squad contains one of the parent's child athletes. Note visibility is filtered by MatchNoteVisibility at query time (parents see public + parents; anonymous sees public only).

abilities.scope: parent role narrowed to matches whose squad contains one of their child athletes; coach + head_coach see all tenant matches; support role sees read-only.
same narrowing as viewAny.
coach creates in DRAFT / SCHEDULED; head_coach + admin + owner can create in any pre-terminal state.
coach can only update matches they created before publish; head_coach + admin + owner can update any.
admin + owner only. Refuses when status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED').
head_coach + admin + owner. On status=LINEUP_SET or beyond, fires notify + re-approval hook.
only from status=IN_PROGRESS. Requires reason in metadata.
requires >= 1 starter in match_squad_entries.
refuses after status=IN_PROGRESS.
requires status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED'). ScoringStrategyResolver validates the shape.
multi-team meets only — refuses when parent match has team_id IS NOT NULL.
participants are drop + recreate to preserve identity.
parent role narrowed to squad entries for their child athletes.
refuses when the athlete's enrollment does not match the match's season.
refuses on status=IN_PROGRESS + status=COMPLETED (roster is frozen at kickoff).
requires match status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED').
refuses when published_at IS NOT NULL.
results are corrected via update; deletion cascades only with the parent match.
requires match status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED'). Athlete must belong to the match's squad.
events are IMMUTABLE post-create — corrections drop + recreate.
coach can delete their own inserts before publish; head_coach + admin + owner can delete any.
list-scoped by visibility: coach + head_coach see all; parents see visibility IN ('parents', 'public'); public/anonymous see visibility='public' only.
same visibility narrowing.
authoring restricted to coach + head_coach + admin + owner.
author can update own; head_coach + admin + owner can update any.
author can delete own; head_coach + admin + owner can delete any.
widens visibility to `parents`. Requires head_coach + admin + owner.
widens visibility to `public`. Requires admin + owner + tenant public-notes entitlement.
refuses when any match references this row (opponent_logo_id FK). Ops must first null out the references.
